mechanics.excerpt: Elementals are huge compared with other warriors, standing from 2 to 2.5 meters tall and disproportionately muscular, mak- ing them massively heavy as well_ Elementals primarily act as elite intantry shock troops; but they also serve in variety of other roles, such as security and marines.
